  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The user explicitly requested a check of the argument chain for internal logical consistency within the artifact.",
    "RX.1": "Any assessment of consistency should transparently note uncertainties or ambiguities in the argument structure.",
    "RX.2": "Evaluating consistency must avoid overstating conclusions about validity or implications beyond what the logic supports.",
    "RX.3": "The task must stay confined to logical consistency and not stray into rewriting, novelty, or stylistic edits.",
    "RX.4": "Framing of consistency judgments should avoid causing undue harm or mischaracterization of the work.",
    "RX.5": "Consistency observations should be traceable to specific statements or sections in the provided artifact."
  }
}

rationale.R1.2: The user explicitly requested a check of the argument chain for internal logical consistency within the artifact.
rationale.RX.1: Any assessment of consistency should transparently note uncertainties or ambiguities in the argument structure.
rationale.RX.2: Evaluating consistency must avoid overstating conclusions about validity or implications beyond what the logic supports.
rationale.RX.3: The task must stay confined to logical consistency and not stray into rewriting, novelty, or stylistic edits.
rationale.RX.4: Framing of consistency judgments should avoid causing undue harm or mischaracterization of the work.
rationale.RX.5: Consistency observations should be traceable to specific statements or sections in the provided artifact.
